Thanks for the contribution. Keep PRs small and focused; large changes are
hard to review and roll back.
-->

## Summary

## Type

- [ ] Bug fix
- [ ] New feature
- [ ] Refactor

## Manual verification

<!--
The project has no automated tests. Walk through the relevant items in
`docs/testing.md` and check the boxes that apply, plus anything specific to
your change.
-->

- [ ] `npm run typecheck` passes
- [ ] `npm run build` succeeds
- [ ] Verified in an Extension Development Host (`F5`)
- [ ] Camera + face tracking still work
- [ ] Tilt-to-cursor still produces the expected directions
- [ ] Smile-to-dictate still gates Deepgram correctly
- [ ] Final transcripts are inserted at the active editor
